ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resistance_cases" (
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resistance case */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the resistance case was reported */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or region where the resistance case was reported */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the state/region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the specific location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the specific location */,
  "first_year" INTEGER /* The first year the resistance case was reported */,
  "situation" TEXT /* The situation or crop in which the resistance was observed */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* List of active ingredients the weed is resistant to */,
  "site_of_action" TEXT /* Description of the site of action of the active ingredients */,
  "weed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weed species involved in the resistance case */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who documented the case */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Exact date the resistance case was reported */,
  "confirmed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who confirmed the resistance case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resistance case */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Link or path to supporting evidence */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the resistance case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_cases_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_cases_weed_id FOREIGN KEY ("weed_id") REFERENCES weeds ("weed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_cases_confirmed_by FOREIGN KEY ("confirmed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeds" (
  "weed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weed species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the weed species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the weed species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the weed species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the weed species */,
  "native_status" TEXT /* Whether the weed is native or invasive */,
  "distribution_map" TEXT /* Link or path to a map showing the distribution of the weed */,
  "growth_habit" TEXT /* Growth habit of the weed */,
  "life_cycle" TEXT /* Life cycle of the weed */,
  "resistance_level" TEXT /* General resistance level of the weed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "active_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each active ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the active ingredient */,
  "moa" TEXT /* Mechanism of action (MOA) of the active ingredient */,
  "hrac_group" TEXT /* HRAC group of the active ingredient */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval for the active ingredient */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number of the active ingredient */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the active ingredient */,
  "toxicity_class" TEXT /* Toxicity class of the active ingredient */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the active ingredient */,
  "alternative_names" TEXT /* Other names by which the active ingredient is known */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites_of_action" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site of action */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site of action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site of action */,
  "chemical_class" TEXT /* Chemical class of the site of action */,
  "mechanism_of_resistance" TEXT /* Mechanism by which resistance can develop at this site of action */,
  "resistance_risk" TEXT /* Risk level of developing resistance at this site of action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "situations" (
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each situation */,
  "situation_name" TEXT /* Name of the situation or crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the situation or crop */,
  "common_practices" TEXT /* Common agricultural practices in the situation */,
  "resistance_risk" TEXT /* Risk level of developing resistance in the situation */,
  "management_practices" TEXT /* Recommended management practices to mitigate resistance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistance_case_ingredients" (
  "case_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-ingredient relationship */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the active ingredient */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the active ingredient used in the case */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_case_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES active_ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_case_ingredients_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistance_case_situations" (
  "case_situation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-situation relationship */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case */,
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the situation */,
  "specific_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the situation */,
  "crop_variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop in the situation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_situation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_case_situations_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_case_situations_situation_id FOREIGN KEY ("situation_id") REFERENCES situations ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistance_case_sites" (
  "case_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-site relationship */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site of action */,
  "site_specific_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes specific to the site of action in the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_case_sites_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_case_sites_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites_of_action ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resistance case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resistance case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resistance case */,
  "resistance_factor" TEXT /* Factors contributing to the resistance */,
  "management_strategy" TEXT /* Management strategy implemented to address the resistance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_history_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_reports_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resistance case */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "resistance_level" TEXT /* Level of resistance */,
  "trend_factor" TEXT /* Factors contributing to the trend */,
  "mitigation_efforts" TEXT /* Efforts made to mitigate the trend */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_trends_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("resistance_id") REFERENCES resistance_cases ("resistance_id")
)
